commands.review_summary:
The PR adds two serialized Swift performance regression tests for cached unchanged-session scans and memoized appended-row priority-turn SQLite scans.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds guards for historical performance regressions rather than reporting a current product failure. The proposed gates have concrete deterministic state checks and repeated local timing results.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This owner-authored PR needs explicit maintainer acceptance of the timing-based CI risk after fresh exact-head checks complete; there is no narrow code defect for an automated repair lane.

target.title: Add performance gates for incremental Codex cost scans
target.body:
## Summary
- add a regression gate proving unchanged Codex session corpora stay on the warm incremental path
- add a regression gate proving priority-turn refreshes scan appended SQLite rows only
- keep the test-only change separate from production scanner behavior

Supersedes #1423 because its fork branch does not allow maintainer edits.

## Proof
- `swift test --filter CostUsagePerformanceGateTests`
  - session corpus: 493x warm/cold ratio
  - priority turns: 56x incremental/full ratio
- `make check`
- structured autoreview: clean, no accepted/actionable findings
target.author: steipete
